name: versionlens-redux
description: Shows the latest version for each package using code lens
author: Peter Flannery

commands.title: An error has occurred. Click to see the log for details.

editor/title.when: versionlens.show == false && versionlens.providerActive && versionlens.providerBusy == false && versionlens.providerError == false && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.show && versionlens.providerActive && versionlens.providerBusy == false && versionlens.providerError == false  && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.providerBusy && versionlens.providerActive && versionlens.providerError == false && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.showPrereleases == false && versionlens.show && versionlens.providerActive && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.show == false && versionlens.providerActive && versionlens.providerBusy == false && versionlens.providerError == false && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.show && versionlens.providerActive && versionlens.providerBusy == false && versionlens.providerError == false  && textCompareEditorVisible == false
versionlens.showPrereleases == false && versionlens.show && versionlens.providerActive && textCompareEditorVisible == false

versionlens.suggestions.showOnStartup.description: Show version suggestions by default on vscode start up.

versionlens.suggestions.showPrereleasesO.description: Show version prerelease suggestions by default on vscode start up.

versionlens.cargo.files.description: Specifies which files to register with version lenses. You can use [micromatch](https://github.com/micromatch/micromatch) expressions to match file names. You will need to restart vscode when changing this setting.

versionlens.composer.files.description: Specifies which files to register with version lenses. You can use [micromatch](https://github.com/micromatch/micromatch) expressions to match file names. You will need to restart vscode when changing this setting.

versionlens.cargo.prereleaseTagFilter.description: Defines a list of prerelease tags you only want to see. i.e. ['alpha', 'beta']. If you don't specify any prerelease tags then all the prerelease tags newer the the latest version are shown when the 'show prerelease' icon is activated.

versionlens.suggestions.showVulnerabilit.description: Show package vulnerabilities as red squiggles in the editor.

versionlens.suggestions.showSuggestionsS.description: Show the stats of all suggestions in the status bar.

versionlens.suggestions.indicators.description: The indicators used when showing version suggestion statuses.

versionlens.npm.dependencyProperties.description: Defines which properties in package.json should be parsed by this extension

versionlens.dotnet.dependencyProperties.description: Defines which project properties should be parsed by this extension

versionlens.dotnet.nuget.sources.description: Defines which nuget source to use for package searching. Has to be a v3 'service index' endpoint. e.g. https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json. Defaults to the sources output by `dotnet nuget list source`

versionlens.enabledProviders.description: Defines a list of providers to enable. If empty, all providers are enabled. You will need to restart vscode when changing this setting.

versionlens.caching.duration.description: Specifies how long (in minutes) version suggestions will be cached. Setting the duration to 0 will disable caching.

versionlens.http.strictSSL.description: When set to 'true' the server will reject any connection which is not authorized within the list of supplied CAs. Set to false for unsigned.

versionlens.npm.onSaveChanges.description: A task label defined in your tasks.json that will be executed when you save a package document that has dependency changes. Ensure to set your `task.options.cwd` to the predefined variable called `${fileDirname}` when running an install task

versionlens.opam.files.description: Specifies which opam package definition files to register with version lenses. You can use [micromatch](https://github.com/micromatch) expressions to match file names. You will need to restart vscode when changing this setting.

versionlens.opam.prereleaseTagFilter.description: Defines a list of prerelease tags you only want to see. i.e. ['alpha', 'beta']. If you don't specify any prerelease tags then all the prerelease tags newer the the latest version are shown when the 'show prerelease' icon is activated.

versionlens.opam.dependencyProperties.description: Defines which dependency groups in opam package definitions should be parsed by this extension

versionlens.opam.caching.duration.description: Specifies how long (in minutes) version suggestions will be cached.

versionlens.opam.http.strictSSL.description: When set to 'true' the server will reject any connection which is not authorized within the list of supplied CAs. Set to false for unsigned. Overrides 'versionlens.http.strictSSL'

versionlens.opam.onSaveChanges.description: A task label defined in your tasks.json that will be executed when you save a package document that has dependency changes. Ensure to set your `task.options.cwd` to the predefined variable called `${fileDirname}` when running an install task

versionlens.opam.apiUrl.description: Defines the opam package site base URL to use for package searching.

versionlens.hackage.files.description: Specifies which Haskell Cabal and Stack files to register with version lenses. You can use [micromatch](https://github.com/micromatch) expressions to match file names. You will need to restart vscode when changing this setting.

versionlens.hackage.prereleaseTagFilter.description: Defines a list of prerelease tags you only want to see. i.e. ['alpha', 'beta']. If you don't specify any prerelease tags then all the prerelease tags newer the the latest version are shown when the 'show prerelease' icon is activated.

versionlens.hackage.dependencyProperties.description: Defines which dependency groups in Cabal, cabal.project, and Stack manifests should be parsed by this extension

versionlens.hackage.caching.duration.description: Specifies how long (in minutes) version suggestions will be cached.

versionlens.hackage.http.strictSSL.description: When set to 'true' the server will reject any connection which is not authorized within the list of supplied CAs. Set to false for unsigned. Overrides 'versionlens.http.strictSSL'

versionlens.hackage.onSaveChanges.description: A task label defined in your tasks.json that will be executed when you save a package document that has dependency changes. Ensure to set your `task.options.cwd` to the predefined variable called `${fileDirname}` when running an install task

versionlens.hackage.apiUrl.description: Defines the Hackage package API base URL to use for Hackage package searching. Stack resolver snapshots use the Stackage snapshots API.
